subcodes.first_line: O spiritual beloved! Thy letter was received and perused with the utmost attention. It added wonder upon wonder that this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب روحانی نامه شما رسید و بدقت امعان نظر گردید حیرت بر حیرت افزود که این
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @relationship between government and people, @power of prayer, @non-participation in politics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @past, present and future of Iran
